prompt: Generate an airplane screen where the starting location is marked with an X icon in Australia, the destination is indicated with a pin in Canada, and an airplane icon is shown on a line connecting the source and destination.
prompt_refined: Generate an airplane screen graphic featuring a world map, similar to image 1. An 'X' icon, as depicted in image 3, should mark the starting location over Australia. A red map pin icon, as depicted in image 2, should indicate the destination over Canada. A prominent line should connect these two locations, representing a flight path. An airplane icon, as depicted in image 4, must be accurately positioned along this connecting line.
objects: red map pin icon (similar to image 2) over Canada
prominent line connecting Australia and Canada
airplane icon (similar to image 4) on the connecting line
